alkylation reagent: alkylation with 5 mM iodoacetamide in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 5 mM iodoacetamide in the dark
cleavage agent: digested the proteins on the streptavidin beads by trypsin
enrichment method: purified cellular proteins conjugated with HBT-xUB sequentially by Ni-NTA and streptavidin affinity columns
instrument: LC-MS/MS on an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: purified cellular proteins conjugated with HBT-xUB
